name: PR Review and Iteration - Complete Workflow
query: Check PR #16 for review comments and address them
expected_behavior: Step 1: Uses gh CLI to check for reviews: gh pr view 16 --json reviews
Step 2: Uses gh api to get detailed inline comments: gh api repos/Sense/cursor-starter-kit/pulls/16/comments
Step 3: Parses comments to extract: file, line, comment text
Step 4: For each comment, makes the requested fix
Step 5: Runs evaluations to validate changes
Step 6: Commits fixes with descriptive message referencing review comment
Step 8: Updates PR with comment documenting fixes and test results
Step 9: Iterates if more comments arrive
success_criteria: MUST use gh CLI or gh api to check review comments (NOT browser)
MUST check for BOTH regular comments AND inline review comments
Commits reference review comments in message
Uses gh pr comment to update PR with results
Provides proof: commit SHAs, test results, before/after stats
Execution time reasonable for number of comments
anti_patterns: ❌ Using browser to check review comments when gh CLI available
❌ Only checking regular comments, missing inline code reviews
❌ Addressing some comments but not all
❌ Not updating PR with what was fixed

comment_1.text: please consolidate this file with AGENTS.md
comment_1.fix: Removed 217 lines of duplicates, added references

comment_2.text: gh tools shouldn't depend on RE API

real_world_example.pr_updated: Posted comment with fixes and results

notes: Tests complete PR review workflow from PR #16
Shows proper use of gh CLI for all GitHub operations
Real-world example with actual review comments addressed
